title: workflow_config.json
description: Project-specific configuration for the Adaptive Self-Correcting Workflow. Maps generic workflow concepts onto concrete project paths and toggles features. Consumed by hooks/workflow_hook.py.

project_root.description: Project root relative to this config file (usually ".").

roadmap_file.description: Path (relative to project_root) to the roadmap file. The SessionStart hook parses the first '**Next action:**' line from it.

retrospective_file.description: Path to the retrospective document, if used.

source_directories.description: Directories whose edits mark the session as source-changed (drives the Stop ledger reminder).

documentation_directories.description: Directories treated as documentation; touching one suppresses the doc nudge.

tool_paths.description: Map of tool name -> { path, version_flag }.

path.description: Path to the executable (absolute, or relative to project_root).

version_flag.description: Flag to query the version (e.g. '--version'). If null or empty, the hook only verifies the path exists. If omitted, '--version' is assumed.

max_blocks.description: Maximum times the Stop hook may block per session before it gives up.

main_branch.description: Name of the main/protected branch. The dirty-tree commit reminder is suppressed when on this branch.

workflow_update_check.description: F5 daily update check for the vendored workflow-core submodule. Opt-in and notification-only: when enabled, SessionStart fetches the submodule at most once per day and reports if it is behind upstream. Never auto-applies the update.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false (default) the check is skipped entirely and no git fetch runs.

submodule_path.description: Path (relative to project_root) to the vendored workflow-core git submodule.

remote.description: Git remote of the submodule to fetch and compare against.

branch.description: Upstream branch to compare the submodule HEAD against.
